user.title: Connect gateway
user.description: Use your Pixie account once to retrieve the parameters needed for ongoing local operation.

gateway_ip.title: Enter gateway IP
gateway_ip.description: Auto-discovery did not find a Pixie gateway within 10 seconds. Enter the gateway IPv4 address to continue.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Pixie entry
reconfigure.description: Choose what you want to update for this Pixie integration.

reconfigure_credentials.title: Add Pixie credentials
reconfigure_credentials.description: Direct local inventory is unavailable. Enter your Pixie account credentials so the integration can use cloud fallback when needed.

reconfigure_gateway_connection.title: Gateway connection
reconfigure_gateway_connection.description: Choose whether this entry should discover the gateway automatically over UDP or use a stored manual IP address.

reconfigure_gateway_ip.title: Manual gateway IP
reconfigure_gateway_ip.description: Enter the Pixie gateway IPv4 address to store in this config entry.

cover_mapping.title: Blind mapping
cover_mapping.description: Map Home Assistant blind actions to the button positions configured in the Pixie app.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the Pixie gateway.

abort.already_configured: This Pixie home is already configured.
abort.reconfigure_failed: The Pixie entry could not be reconfigured.

missing_fallback_credentials.title: Pixie credentials required for fallback
missing_fallback_credentials.description: Direct local inventory is unavailable for {entry_title}. The integration is running from the stored inventory snapshot. Reconfigure the integration and enter your Pixie username and password so it can use cloud fallback when direct local inventory is unavailable.

gateway_ip_required.title: Pixie gateway connection requires attention
gateway_ip_required.description: The integration could not reach the Pixie gateway for {entry_title}. Reconfigure the integration to enter a working gateway IP address or switch back to UDP discovery.

init.title: Blind mapping
init.description: Adjust the button positions used for blind commands.

abort.no_blind_devices: No blind devices were found for this Pixie home.
